commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=2db87abad9628c2c6c19157e5e6ca375dc291dc2)
commands.review_summary:
The PR generates and uploads a JPEG preview frame for outbound Feishu video messages, then includes the returned `image_key` with the Feishu `media` message `file_key`.

PR surface: Source +114, Tests +48. Total +162 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main routes videos as Feishu `media` messages but serializes only `file_key`, while Feishu's docs identify `image_key` as the optional cover key and the PR supplies live after-fix screenshot/readback proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Queue a narrow repair because the remaining blocker is a mechanical timeout and regression-test change in Feishu media preview extraction.

target.title: fix(feishu): add video preview covers
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves
OpenClaw sends outbound Feishu videos as `msg_type=media` with only `{ file_key }`. Feishu's message-content docs say video `media` messages can also include an optional `image_key` for the cover image; when OpenClaw omits it, video bubbles can render without a preview frame.

Docs: https://open.feishu.cn/document/server-docs/im-v1/message-content-description/create_json?lang=zh-CN

## Summary
- Generate a JPEG preview frame for outbound Feishu video messages and upload it with the existing image upload API.
- Include the returned `image_key` alongside `file_key` for `msg_type=media`, matching Feishu's documented video content shape.
- Keep the preview best-effort: if frame extraction or preview upload fails, the video still sends with the existing `{ file_key }` payload.

## Evidence
- `git diff --check`
- `/home/l/.local/share/pnpm/pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/feishu/src/media.ts extensions/feishu/src/media.test.ts`
- `/home/l/.local/share/pnpm/pnpm exec node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/feishu/src/media.test.ts` (45 tests passed)
- Live Feishu send with the new branch succeeded for a 5-second mp4. A `message.get` readback returned `code=0`, `msgType=media`, and confirmed the sent content contains both `file_key` and `image_key` without logging the private keys.
- Screenshot proof: the lower video bubble renders the generated preview frame; the upper gray bubble is a no-preview comparison. Duration display is intentionally out of scope for this PR and is covered separately by #98235.

![Feishu video preview proof](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/areslp/openclaw/codex/pr-98458-feishu-preview-proof/pr-evidence/feishu-video-preview-cover.jpg)

- The first live attempt exposed ffmpeg's safe-output `.part` suffix handling; the implementation now explicitly uses `-c:v mjpeg -f image2` instead of relying on the output filename extension.
target.author: areslp
